notInResourceChannel: 🪶 Wrong parchment. This belongs in the Resource channel.
🪶 Transactions are recorded in the Resource channel, not here.
🪶 Let’s keep the ledger tidy — use the Resource channel for this.

invalidItem: Name the item, please. My ledger doesn’t accept ‘vibes’.
If you can’t name it, you can’t buy it. Even I have standards.
You didn’t tell me what you’re buying. Try again with a name.
invalidAmount: That isn’t a valid amount. Positive numbers only.
I can’t transcribe imaginary or negative gold. Try again.
This ledger only accepts real, positive coin.
invalidPrecision: GP uses two decimal places. Please round neatly.
Too many decimals. My ink refuses to wobble that far.
Quil prefers cents, not dust. Two decimals, please.
noFunds: Insufficient {resources}. Your coin purse is lighter than a feather.
Not enough {resources} for that purchase. The ledger frowns.
Balance too low for {resources}. Consider selling something shiny first.
noPlayerRecord: Hi {user}, I can’t find your character log. Please `/initiate` first, then try again.
No ledger entry for you yet, {user}. Initiate your character to record purchases.
I don’t see a record for {user}. Get initiated and we’ll ink the purchase.
noResourceSpecified: You must specify at least one resource to spend. Try `/buy item:<name> gp:<amount>`.
I can't log a purchase without knowing what you're spending. Specify GP, GT, DTP, or CC.
The ledger requires actual coin. Please provide at least one resource amount.
ccCrewOnly: Crew Coins are reserved for crew members and above. You don't have access to that ledger.
CC is a crew-level resource. Only crew members and above may use it.
My quill refuses to ink CC transactions for non-crew. Crew rank required.

purchaseSuccess: Purchase complete, {name}: **{item}** for **{amount} GP**. New total: **{newGp} GP**.
Logged {name}: **{item}** bought for **{amount} GP**. Balance now **{newGp} GP**.
Ledger updated {name} — **{item}** purchased (**{amount} GP**). Remaining GP: **{newGp}**.
